# screenScale1x

**Type Property**

An image to display on devices running in a 1x resolution mode.

## Declaration

```swift
static var screenScale1x: TVTopShelfItem.ImageTraits { get }
```

## Image Traits

- **screenScale2x**: A high-resolution image to display on devices running in a 2x resolution mode.
